title: Fasl al-Maqal: The Decisive Treatise
description: Averroes argues that Islamic law not only permits but requires the study of philosophy.
introduction: Averroes argues that Islamic law not only permits but requires the study of philosophy.

translation.text: Since this religion is true, and since it calls to reflection leading to knowledge of the truth, we Muslims know for certain that demonstrative study does not lead to conclusions contrary to scripture.
